label: exposure process
obsolescence reason: Field is now available in an appropriate domain ontology.
Notes: Original context for creation of GENEPIO ID: (2022-01-19) Rhiannon with Damion and we decided a new term “exposure process” (GENEPIO:0100296) is a reasonable place to house these terms because some of these exposures are not specific to animals nor humans (which are the terms GENEPIO already has). I suggested moving the "animal" and "human" specific exposure processes as subclasses.
